---
name: Good first issue
about: Suggest a small example, schema, or documentation improvement
title: "[Good first issue] "
labels: good first issue, documentation
assignees: ""
---

## What should be improved?

Describe the small improvement you want to make.

## Suggested area

- [ ] Buyer intent example
- [ ] Supplier capability example
- [ ] Match explanation
- [ ] Connector boundary
- [ ] Documentation wording
- [ ] Other

## Why it helps

Explain how this makes the public MapleBridge Open contract easier to understand or reuse.

## Public boundary check

- [ ] This does not require production MapleBridge code.
- [ ] This does not include customer, buyer, or supplier private data.
- [ ] This does not expose private crawler, ranking, or credential details.
